semantic.role: Index metadata for the ArchSpine mirror system, tracking synchronization state and file inventory.
responsibilities: Maintaining synchronization status (last sync timestamp, mode, reverse index completeness, indexed unit count).
Tracking source files with content hashes, file kind, indexing timestamps, and documentation paths by locale.
Enabling reverse index lookups and verifying file existence.
invariants: contentHash must be a 64-character hex string (SHA-256).
sourceExists must be a boolean value (true or false).
fileKind must be a defined kind (e.g., 'source').
docs entries must have locale matching available locales (e.g., 'zh-CN').
reverseIndexComplete must be false if not all files have been indexed.
indexedUnitCount must reflect the number of indexed units.

English.role: Index metadata for the ArchSpine mirror system, tracking synchronization state and file inventory.

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: Defines the version of the config schema to ensure compatibility.
parameter_definitions.generatorVersion: Identifies the tool and version that generated this file.
parameter_definitions.createdAt: Timestamp when the index was first created.
parameter_definitions.updatedAt: Timestamp of the last update to this index.

sync.lastSyncAt: The most recent time synchronization occurred.
sync.lastSyncMode: The mode of the last sync (e.g., 'full' or 'incremental').
sync.reverseIndexComplete: Boolean indicating whether the reverse index has been fully built.
sync.indexedUnitCount: Number of indexing units that have been processed.

parameter_definitions.files: An object mapping source file paths to their metadata.
parameter_definitions.contentHash: SHA-256 hash of the file content for integrity verification.
parameter_definitions.lastIndexedAt: Timestamp when the file was last indexed.
parameter_definitions.docs: List of documentation files associated with this source, per locale.
parameter_definitions.sourceExists: Boolean indicating whether the source file still exists on disk.

English.stability_and_risks: This configuration file is critical for mirror integrity. Incorrect or stale hashes may cause unrecognized changes or failed syncs. The reverseIndexComplete flag affects query performance. The indexedUnitCount must match the actual number of processed units. Missing or malformed entries could lead to incomplete documentation generation.

Simplified Chinese.role: ArchSpine镜像系统的索引元数据，用于记录同步状态和文件清单。

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: 定义配置文件架构的版本，确保兼容性。
parameter_definitions.generatorVersion: 标识生成此文件的工具及其版本。
parameter_definitions.createdAt: 索引首次创建的时间戳。
parameter_definitions.updatedAt: 此索引最近一次更新的时间戳。

sync.lastSyncAt: 最近一次同步发生的时间。
sync.lastSyncMode: 最近一次同步的模式（例如'完整'或'增量'）。
sync.reverseIndexComplete: 布尔值，表示反向索引是否已完全构建。
sync.indexedUnitCount: 已经处理的索引单元数量。

parameter_definitions.files: 一个对象，将源文件路径映射到它们的元数据。
parameter_definitions.contentHash: 文件内容的SHA-256哈希值，用于完整性验证。
parameter_definitions.fileKind: 文件的类别（例如'source'源代码，'config'配置）。
parameter_definitions.lastIndexedAt: 该文件最近一次被索引的时间戳。
parameter_definitions.docs: 与此源文件关联的文档文件列表，按语言区域区分。
parameter_definitions.sourceExists: 布尔值，表示源文件是否仍然存在于磁盘上。

Simplified Chinese.stability_and_risks: 此配置文件对镜像系统的完整性至关重要。哈希值不正确或过时可能导致无法识别的更改或同步失败。reverseIndexComplete标志影响查询性能。indexedUnitCount必须与实际处理的单元数量一致。条目缺失或格式错误可能导致文档生成不完整。
